examples: But do let her go, Jacky, 'coaxed his poor witless wife.
'But do let her go, Jacky,' coaxed his poor witless wife.
For the past 15 years or so, graduates have emerged blinking into the white light of a witless and capricious boom time.
Isolationism of each variety can be found in both political parties, but isolationism is witless.
And that might, in the future, be an awful lot of witless, wandering elderly.
